studyName: NHLBI GO-ESP: Heart Cohorts Exome Sequencing Project (CHS)

tables.description: This data table includes variables harmonized across all ESP studies. Variables query for general medical history information (e.g. family history of stroke, presence/absence of hypertension, atrial fibrillation event(s), PAD, type 2 diabetes, etc.), blood pressure and lipid values, as well as levels of insulin, glucose, fibrinogen, interleukin 6, etc. Data of ECG measurements, height, weight, body mass index, etc., and general sociodemographic data are also included.

variables.name: ESP_ABI_resids_from_CARe
variables.description: Residuals for ankle brachial index (ABI), calculated in CARe

variables.name: ESP_Cohort
variables.description: Cohort name

variables.name: ESP_afib_baseline
variables.description: Atrial fibrillation at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_afib_during_followup
variables.description: 0/1 to indicate that an afib occurred during study follow up.  0 if no afib during study follow up.  1 if an adjudicated afib occurred during study follow up.

variables.name: ESP_afib_tte_or_censor
variables.description: Time to event variable for afib.  Time (in days) from start of study to afib for event that occurred during study follow up; and follow up time for those that did not have an afib during study follow up.

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, ESP phenotype group, analyte type, and tumor status.

variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.description: ID for exome data

variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: gencons
variables.description: Consent group

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: ID for exome data

variables.description: Sample use
